controls.title: Authorized Access Control
controls.description: Limit information system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, or devices (including other information systems).

controls.title: Transaction & Function Control
controls.description: Limit information system access to the types of transactions and functions that authorized users are permitted to execute.

controls.title: Control CUI Flow
controls.description: Control the flow of CUI in accordance with approved authorizations.

controls.title: Separation of Duties
controls.description: Separate the duties of individuals to reduce the risk of malevolent activity without collusion.

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.description: Employ the principle of least privilege, including for specific security functions and privileged accounts.

controls.title: Non-Privileged Account Use
controls.description: Use non-privileged accounts or roles when accessing nonsecurity functions.

controls.title: Privileged Functions
controls.description: Prevent non-privileged users from executing privileged functions and capture the execution of such functions in audit logs.

controls.title: Unsuccessful Logon Attempts
controls.description: Limit unsuccessful logon attempts.

controls.title: Privacy & Security Notices
controls.description: Provide privacy and security notices consistent with applicable CUI rules.

controls.title: Session Lock
controls.description: Use session lock with pattern-hiding displays to prevent access and viewing of data after a period of inactivity.

controls.title: Session Termination
controls.description: Terminate (automatically) a user session after a defined condition.

controls.title: Control Remote Access
controls.description: Monitor and control remote access sessions.

controls.title: Remote Access Confidentiality
controls.description: Employ cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality of remote access sessions.

controls.title: Remote Access Routing
controls.description: Route remote access via managed access control points.

controls.title: Privileged Remote Access
controls.description: Authorize remote execution of privileged commands and remote access to security-relevant information.

controls.title: Wireless Access Authorization
controls.description: Authorize wireless access prior to allowing such connections.

controls.title: Wireless Access Protection
controls.description: Protect wireless access using authentication and encryption.

controls.title: Mobile Device Connection
controls.description: Control connection of mobile devices.

controls.title: Encrypt CUI on Mobile
controls.description: Encrypt CUI on mobile devices and mobile computing platforms.

controls.title: External Connections
controls.description: Verify and control/limit connections to and use of external information systems.

controls.title: Portable Storage Use
controls.description: Limit use of portable storage devices on external information systems.

controls.title: Control Public Information
controls.description: Control information posted or processed on publicly accessible information systems.

controls.title: Role-Based Risk Awareness
controls.description: Ensure that managers, systems administrators, and users of organizational information systems are made aware of the security risks associated with their activities and of the applicable policies, standards, and procedures related to the security of organizational information systems.

controls.title: Role-Based Training
controls.description: Ensure that personnel are trained to carry out their assigned information security-related duties and responsibilities.

controls.title: Insider Threat Awareness
controls.description: Provide security awareness training on recognizing and reporting potential indicators of insider threat.

controls.title: System Auditing
controls.description: Create and retain system audit logs and records to the extent needed to enable the monitoring, analysis, investigation, and reporting of unlawful or unauthorized system activity.

controls.title: User Accountability
controls.description: Ensure that the actions of individual system users can be uniquely traced to those users so they can be held accountable for their actions.

controls.title: Event Review
controls.description: Review and update logged events.

controls.title: Audit Failure Alerting
controls.description: Alert in the event of an audit logging process failure.

controls.title: Audit Correlation
controls.description: Correlate audit record review, analysis, and reporting processes to support organizational processes for investigation and response to indications of unlawful, unauthorized, suspicious, or unusual activity.

controls.title: Audit Reduction & Reporting
controls.description: Provide audit record reduction and report generation to support on-demand analysis and reporting.

controls.title: Authoritative Time Source
controls.description: Provide a system capability that compares and synchronizes internal system clocks with an authoritative source to generate time stamps for audit records.

controls.title: Audit Protection
controls.description: Protect audit information and audit logging tools from unauthorized access, modification, and deletion.

controls.title: Audit Management
controls.description: Limit management of audit logging functionality to a subset of privileged users.

controls.title: System Baselining
controls.description: Establish and maintain baseline configurations and inventories of organizational information systems (including hardware, software, firmware, and documentation) throughout the respective system development life cycles.

controls.title: Security Configuration Enforcement
controls.description: Establish and enforce security configuration settings for information technology products employed in organizational information systems.

controls.title: System Change Management
controls.description: Track, review, approve or disapprove, and log changes to organizational information systems.

controls.title: Security Impact Analysis
controls.description: Analyze the security impact of changes prior to implementation.

controls.title: Access Restrictions for Change
controls.description: Define, document, approve, and enforce physical and logical access restrictions associated with changes to organizational information systems.

controls.title: Least Functionality
controls.description: Employ the principle of least functionality by configuring organizational information systems to provide only essential capabilities.

controls.title: Nonessential Functionality
controls.description: Restrict, disable, or prevent the use of nonessential programs, functions, ports, protocols, and services.

controls.title: Application Execution Policy
controls.description: Apply deny-by-exception (blacklisting) policy to prevent the use of unauthorized software or deny-all, permit-by-exception (whitelisting) policy to allow the execution of authorized software.

controls.title: User-Installed Software
controls.description: Control and monitor user-installed software.

controls.title: Identification
controls.description: Identify information system users, processes acting on behalf of users, or devices.

controls.title: Authentication
controls.description: Authenticate (or verify) the identities of those users, processes, or devices, as a prerequisite to allowing access to organizational information systems.

controls.title: Multifactor Authentication
controls.description: Use multifactor authentication for local and network access to privileged accounts and for network access to non-privileged accounts.

controls.title: Replay-Resistant Authentication
controls.description: Employ replay-resistant authentication mechanisms for network access to privileged and non-privileged accounts.

controls.title: Identifier Reuse
controls.description: Prevent reuse of identifiers for a defined period.

controls.title: Identifier Handling
controls.description: Disable identifiers after a defined period of inactivity.

controls.title: Password Complexity
controls.description: Enforce a minimum password complexity and change of characters when new passwords are created.

controls.title: Password Reuse
controls.description: Prohibit password reuse for a specified number of generations.

controls.title: Temporary Passwords
controls.description: Allow temporary password use for system logons with an immediate change to a permanent password.

controls.title: Cryptographically-Protected Passwords
controls.description: Store and transmit only cryptographically-protected passwords.

controls.title: Obscure Feedback
controls.description: Obscure feedback of authentication information.

controls.title: Incident Handling
controls.description: Establish an operational incident-handling capability for organizational information systems that includes preparation, detection, analysis, containment, recovery, and user response activities.

controls.title: Incident Reporting
controls.description: Track, document, and report incidents to designated officials and/or authorities both internal and external to the organization.

controls.title: Incident Response Testing
controls.description: Test the organizational incident response capability.

controls.title: Perform Maintenance
controls.description: Perform maintenance on organizational information systems.

controls.title: System Maintenance Control
controls.description: Provide controls on the tools, techniques, mechanisms, and personnel used to conduct information system maintenance.

controls.title: Equipment Sanitization
controls.description: Ensure equipment removed for off-site maintenance is sanitized of any CUI.

controls.title: Media Inspection
controls.description: Check media containing diagnostic and test programs for malicious code before the media are used in the information system.

controls.title: Nonlocal Maintenance
controls.description: Require multifactor authentication to establish nonlocal maintenance sessions via external network connections and terminate such connections when nonlocal maintenance is complete.

controls.title: Maintenance Personnel
controls.description: Supervise the maintenance activities of maintenance personnel without required access authorization.

controls.title: Media Protection
controls.description: Protect (i.e., physically control and securely store) information system media containing CUI, both paper and digital.

controls.title: Media Access
controls.description: Limit access to CUI on information system media to authorized users.

controls.title: Media Disposal
controls.description: Sanitize or destroy information system media containing CUI before disposal or release for reuse.

controls.title: Media Markings
controls.description: Mark media with necessary CUI markings and distribution limitations.

controls.title: Media Accountability
controls.description: Control access to media containing CUI and maintain accountability for media during transport outside of controlled areas.

controls.title: Portable Storage Encryption
controls.description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality of CUI stored on digital media during transport unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards.

controls.title: Removable Media
controls.description: Control the use of removable media on information system components.

controls.title: Shared Media
controls.description: Prohibit the use of portable storage devices when such devices have no identifiable owner.

controls.title: Protect Backups
controls.description: Protect the confidentiality of backup CUI at storage locations.

controls.title: Screen Individuals
controls.description: Screen individuals prior to authorizing access to organizational information systems containing CUI.

controls.title: Personnel Actions
controls.description: Ensure that organizational information systems containing CUI are protected during and after personnel actions such as terminations and transfers.

controls.title: Limit Physical Access
controls.description: Limit physical access to organizational information systems, equipment, and the respective operating environments to authorized individuals.

controls.title: Protect & Monitor Facility
controls.description: Protect and monitor the physical facility and support infrastructure for organizational information systems.

controls.title: Escort Visitors
controls.description: Escort visitors and monitor visitor activity.

controls.title: Physical Access Logs
controls.description: Maintain audit logs of physical access.

controls.title: Manage Physical Access
controls.description: Control and manage physical access devices.

controls.title: Alternative Work Sites
controls.description: Enforce safeguarding measures for CUI at alternate work sites.

controls.title: Risk Assessments
controls.description: Periodically assess the risk to organizational operations (including mission, functions, image, or reputation), organizational assets, and individuals, resulting from the operation of organizational information systems and the associated processing, storage, or transmission of CUI.

controls.title: Vulnerability Scan
controls.description: Scan for vulnerabilities in organizational information systems and applications periodically and when new vulnerabilities affecting those systems and applications are identified.

controls.title: Vulnerability Remediation
controls.description: Remediate vulnerabilities in accordance with risk assessments.

controls.title: Security Control Assessment
controls.description: Periodically assess the security controls in organizational information systems to determine if the controls are effective in their application.

controls.title: Plan of Action
controls.description: Develop and implement plans of action designed to correct deficiencies and reduce or eliminate vulnerabilities in organizational information systems.

controls.title: Security Control Monitoring
controls.description: Monitor security controls on an ongoing basis to ensure the continued effectiveness of the controls.

controls.title: System Security Plan
controls.description: Develop, document, and periodically update system security plans that describe system boundaries, system environments of operation, how security requirements are implemented, and the relationships with or connections to other systems.

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.description: Monitor, control, and protect communications (i.e., information transmitted or received by organizational information systems) at the external boundaries and key internal boundaries of organizational information systems.

controls.title: Security Engineering
controls.description: Employ architectural designs, software development techniques, and systems engineering principles that promote effective information security within organizational information systems.

controls.title: Role Separation
controls.description: Separate user functionality from information system management functionality.

controls.title: Shared Resource Control
controls.description: Prevent unauthorized and unintended information transfer via shared system resources.

controls.title: Public-Access System Separation
controls.description: Implement subnetworks for publicly accessible system components that are physically or logically separated from internal networks.

controls.title: Network Communication by Exception
controls.description: Deny network communications traffic by default and allow network communications traffic by exception (i.e., deny all, permit by exception).

controls.title: Split Tunneling
controls.description: Prevent remote devices from simultaneously establishing non-remote connections with organizational information systems and communicating via some other connection to resources in external networks (i.e., split tunneling).

controls.title: Data in Transit
controls.description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure of CUI during transmission unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards.

controls.title: Network Disconnect
controls.description: Terminate network connections associated with communications sessions at the end of the sessions or after a defined period of inactivity.

controls.title: Key Management
controls.description: Establish and manage cryptographic keys for cryptography employed in organizational information systems.

controls.title: CUI Encryption
controls.description: Employ FIPS-validated cryptography when used to protect the confidentiality of CUI.

controls.title: Collaborative Device Control
controls.description: Prohibit remote activation of collaborative computing devices and provide indication of devices in use to users present at the device.

controls.title: Mobile Code
controls.description: Control and monitor the use of mobile code.

controls.title: Voice over Internet Protocol
controls.description: Control and monitor the use of Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) technologies.

controls.title: Communications Authenticity
controls.description: Protect the authenticity of communications sessions.

controls.title: Data at Rest
controls.description: Protect the confidentiality of CUI at rest.

controls.title: Flaw Remediation
controls.description: Identify, report, and correct information and information system flaws in a timely manner.

controls.title: Malicious Code Protection
controls.description: Provide protection from malicious code at appropriate locations within organizational information systems.

controls.title: Security Alerts & Advisories
controls.description: Monitor system security alerts and advisories and take action in response.

controls.title: Update Malicious Code Protection
controls.description: Update malicious code protection mechanisms when new releases are available.

controls.title: System & File Scanning
controls.description: Perform periodic scans of the information system and real-time scans of files from external sources as files are downloaded, opened, or executed.

controls.title: Monitor Communications for Attacks
controls.description: Monitor organizational information systems, including inbound and outbound communications traffic, to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks.

controls.title: Identify Unauthorized Use
controls.description: Identify unauthorized use of organizational information systems.
